title: Project Amazo
description: Project Amazo is a palladium addon based on the dcau anti hero amazo
body:
Project Amazo is a palladium addon based on the dcau anti hero amazo with some creative liberties

**how too obtain amazo:**
go too a mushroom island and find ivo's lab, there you will find the amazo particles, wear it and you will become amazo, and unlock genetic copy, after you will need xp too unlock the rest of the justice leagues abilities

addons that can be used with power copy
fsang18's heroes
powerborne
a new corps
more soon!

amazo is also immune too bullets from tacz and radiation from alex's cave

credits
spidey/debonmoy who helped with laser vision

iron or glitch who made the superspeed icon

nox who made dr ivo's lab

catgirl who reshaded and retextured injustice amazo

and a few others who helped me

(i do not gain any profits from this)
